sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_tile: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized tile converter using Q15 scale and signed zero-point.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized operands with INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_tile: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantizer that applies Q15 scale_A*scale_B and emits packed IEEE-754 FP32 bit patterns.
